channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin miners' AI pivot faces $50 billion reality check, says VanEck
item.description: VanEck says investors are shifting focus from contract announcements to execution risk as miners chase AI revenue.

item.title: Tokenized asset market tops $43B as institutions accelerate blockchain adoption
item.description: Tokenized financial assets have surged 37% in six months as institutions expand blockchain adoption and the market broadens beyond funds and private credit, according to Token Terminal.

item.title: U.S. senators urge Treasury not to leave states out of GENIUS Act stablecoin process
item.description: Senators led by Republican Cynthia Lummis are insisting the Treasury Department ensure states get a process to prove their ability to supervise stablecoins.

item.title: Crypto Exchange Binance Will Be Rejected for EU Regulatory License: Reuters
item.description: Binance said it believes it is compliant as a regulatory deadline in the European Union nears—and a report says it's likely to lose access.

item.title: Hyperliquid, Uniswap and Worldcoin buck crypto slump as traders chase AI, DeFi trends
item.description: A handful of tokens continued their run while bitcoin and the rest of the crypto market stalled after the early week bounce.

item.title: ChatGPT Is Still Huge, But Rival AI Chatbots Are Catching Up Fast
item.description: Sensor Tower's State of AI 2026 report shows ChatGPT's audience share slipping below 50% for the first time, as Gemini's default-app advantage and Claude's Pentagon-fueled rally eat into OpenAI's lead.

item.title: Bitcoin metric near ‘low-risk’ zone after holders absorb 125K BTC in June: Time for a rebound?
item.description: Bitcoin’s Sharpe ratio and a 125,000 BTC increase in BTC accumulator demand mark the start of a new demand phase. Will prices follow?

item.title: FBI Says It Foiled Drone Attack Plot Targeting White House UFC Event
item.description: Federal prosecutors allege five men planned to use explosive-laden drones and sniper teams to take out "high-value targets" at the UFC event.

item.title: Crypto PAC has $12M stake in Senate primary runoff as Alabama voters head to polls
item.description: Defend American Jobs reported spending $7.4 million on media to support Republican Barry Moore ahead of his May 20 Alabama primary, and an additional $4.7 million before Tuesday’s runoffs.

item.title: Coinbase lets users transfer stock portfolios as exchange expands beyond crypto
item.description: The crypto exchange is deepening its push into traditional finance by enabling ACATS stock transfers and expanding trading products beyond digital assets.

item.title: Coinbase Gears Up to Launch Tokenized Stock Trading, Crypto and Equities Options
item.description: Publicly traded crypto exchange Coinbase added to its feature set Tuesday as it seeks to become the "everything exchange."

item.title: Coinbase intoduces AI advisor, stock options, and pre-IPO markets in finance push
item.description: The crypto exchange is expanding into investing, derivatives and banking services as it pursues an all-in-one financial platform.

item.title: XRP whale wallet withdrawals top 720M as risk-adjusted return data points to opportunity
item.description: Whales pulled more than 720 million XRP from exchanges, as various data points converge to predict a potential 50% rally.

item.title: Japan Rates Hit Three-Decade High, But No ‘Meaningful Disruption’ to Crypto Market
item.description: Japan's central bank lifted rates to a level unseen in decades, a move that once shook crypto markets—yet prices barely stirred.

item.title: Bitcoin has already won as Digital Capital. The next wave is Digital Credit, Digital Money, Digital Yield, and Bitcoin-backed capital markets — products that can bring trillions of dollars of traditional credit and money market capital onto Bitcoin. My interview with - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5qUUJsUXdxaVhsVTljWGxIUzJPTEpYY2JyX2hlYzZUdzdydURJT0tlczh3Z3M0SDJzenVFMEZ1YkIta0cwSlNJT0FZSTJvdUxRYnctRWpXV0p2bms?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin has already won as Digital Capital.…

item.title: State Street launches GENIUS Act-aligned money market fund for stablecoin reserves
item.description: The launch comes amid growing competition among financial institutions to manage assets backing dollar-pegged stablecoins.

item.title: Ripple targets Africa’s booming remittance market with Flutterwave investment
item.description: Ripple’s investment in Flutterwave will bring RLUSD, Ripple Payments and XRPL to one of Africa’s largest fintechs as blockchain remittances gain traction.

item.title: SpaceX Shares Hit New High as Elon Musk's Firm Agrees to Acquire AI Startup Cursor for $60 Billion
item.description: The all-stock deal would make Cursor a wholly owned SpaceX subsidiary and deepen the company's push into AI following its blockbuster IPO.

item.title: 7 Ways Businesses Are Using Crypto Swap APIs
item.description: Real-world case studies show how the best crypto swap APIs help wallets, aggregators, and protocols improve onboarding and retention.

item.title: Why US-regulated Bitcoin perpetuals could change crypto trading
item.description: US-regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures could give retail and institutional traders new ways to access crypto derivatives.

item.title: BINANCE COULD LOSE ACCESS TO THE EUROPEAN UNION Reuters reports Binance’s application for a MiCA licence in Greece is expected to be rejected, potentially preventing the world’s largest crypto exchange from offering services across the EU after - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBta2lvU0tjTWNjT1JfaGFGTW5ZMXBsT1J6N0ZzaGZMVzJ5TXpiTnhrYk5HZGZQbE5wc3BUbUN2ZlBXZFl3NkdKUnNwU2wwV3hoSHRuYUdUc0NlN0tkdC0yQ1B6cnVIQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BINANCE COULD LOSE ACCESS TO…

item.title: Binance says it considers EU license compliant amid reports of potential rejection
item.description: Without specifically calling out a report on Binance’s EU license, the crypto exchange warned that any rejection forcing it to delay activities in the region could “weaken liquidity” and present other potential risks.

item.title: OFAC and Crypto Crime: Every OFAC Specially Designated National with Identified Cryptocurrency Addresses
item.description: As far back as the early 1800s, the U.S. Department of the Treasury has issued economic sanctions to achieve foreign… The post OFAC and Crypto Crime: Every OFAC Specially Designated National with Identified Cryptocurrency Addresses appeare…

item.title: Ripple invests in Flutterwave, pushing its stablecoin and XRP Ledger into payments across Africa
item.description: The deal values Flutterwave at $3.2 billion, and will integrate Ripple's RLUSD and the XRP Ledger network to speed cross-border payments across Africa.

item.title: Robinhood Trims Headcount by 10% Amid Crypto Revenue Crunch
item.description: Robinhood is letting go of 10% of its employees, attempting to streamline operations amid a downturn in crypto-related revenue.

item.title: Coinbase to join tokenized stock race with onchain shares, dividend payments
item.description: The crypto exchange said investors will own the shares and receive dividends, underscoring growing momentum behind tokenized securities.

item.title: Binance says its European regulatory application is compliant despite report of Greek rejection
item.description: An EU crypto license application by the world’s largest crypto exchange is set to be rejected by the Greek regulator HCMC, according to a report from Reuters.

item.title: Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage
item.description: Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment.

item.title: State Street targets stablecoin reserve boom with new money market fund
item.description: The asset manager joins BlackRock, Franklin Templeton and others competing to manage reserves backing the growing stablecoin market.

item.title: Bitcoin stocks divergence returns as BTC dips to $66K while oil drops under $78
item.description: Bitcoin joined oil in heading lower while stocks gained on US-Iran peace momentum, with traders seeing a quick end to the BTC price rebound.

item.title: JUST IN: $14 trillion BlackRock's Bitcoin Premium Income ETF is now trading live 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9aNmFpNVRCbGlXZG5Ed21nbFVkWFJCT3VtYW1RcGMxajYySWgtSl80WXJOTU1xX09GNDBwdEpHTVZRZEhlRE10bk0xNE1UZFNSMEVxbEtvZ3JZR2EzV1A1TnM0WE1aUlU?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $14 trillion Black…

item.title: SpaceX’s debut: A win for crypto price discovery, a fail for tokenized access
item.description: SpaceX’s blockbuster debut didn’t just mint a trillionaire; it became a real-world stress test for crypto’s promise of democratized market access.

item.title: Why a ‘safe’ AI can turn dangerous in the wrong company
item.description: A 15-day AI agent simulation shows why short tests may miss long-term risks shaped by tools, rules and other agents.

item.title: Scale of Stablecoin Adoption in Nigeria Makes Risks 'More Pronounced', Says IMF
item.description: Efforts to suppress stablecoin use are “likely to be only partly effective,” the International Monetary Fund’s researchers said.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) gains 12.9% while index trades lower
item.description: Stellar (XLM), up 2.7% from Monday, joined Uniswap (UNI) as a top performer.

item.title: Y Combinator reveals a new AI agent that can build and run an entire business just from a text message
item.description: Y Combinator's Locus Founder lets users text a business idea via iMessage, SMS, or Telegram, and the AI handles the rest.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Bitcoin sell-off toward $60K may resume as Japan hikes interest rates
item.description: Japan’s highest rates since 1995 are putting global liquidity back in focus as traders anticipate 26%–38% BTC price declines.

item.title: Hyperliquid ETFs Draw In $172M Since Launch as HYPE Hits All-Time High
item.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have shed nearly $5.6 billion since Hyperliquid ETFs launched, highlighting market divergence.

item.title: Robinhood cuts 10% of workforce as Tenev touts business strength
item.description: Robinhood cuts about 10% of staff as CEO Vlad Tenev says business “has never been stronger” despite weak Q1 trading.

item.title: Morning Minute: HYPE Soars to ATH as SPCX Takes Off
item.description: SPCX jumped 20%+ in after hours trading last night with all eyes on its Hyperliquid perp, leading to a 12% spike in HYPE.

item.title: BlackRock Debuts BITA Bitcoin ETF, Trading Partial Upside for Double-Digit Yield
item.description: BlackRock launched an ETF that limits Bitcoin gains in exchange for double-digit payouts by selling call options on its holdings.

item.title: BlackRock's new bitcoin income fund offers cash flow alongside BTC exposure
item.description: After IBIT's $49 billion success, BlackRock says clients are increasingly seeking ways to earn income from long-term bitcoin holdings.

item.title: Mystery Polymarket trader turned $4 million into $9 million after Spain's shocking World Cup draw
item.description: A days-old account turned about $4 million into a $9 million profit betting against Spain, an anomaly trade that onchain sleuths are asking whether it was luck or inside information.

item.title: South Korea Charges 23 Over Crypto Laundering Tied to $11M Cambodian Scam Ring
item.description: South Korea has arrested dozens accused of moving $11.1 million in crypto for a Cambodia-based phishing group.

item.title: Solana treasury firms resist Forward Industries’ consolidation push
item.description: Two Solana treasury firms rejected acquisition proposals from Forward Industries, while a third offer expired without a response.

item.title: BlackRock's new bitcoin ETF lets institutions earn from volatility. There's a catch.
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 16, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin buyers add over 250,000 BTC between $59,000 and $67,000 as accumulation returns
item.description: Glassnode data shows broad-based buying across retail and whale cohorts, with the Accumulation Trend Score reaching its strongest level of the current drawdown.

item.title: Bitcoin rallies after Japan rate increase with XLM, INJ, UNI advancing
item.description: Stellar’s XLM, Injective’s INJ and Uniswap’s UNI ranked among the best performers in the 100 biggest cryptocurrencies by market capitalization.

item.title: Bitcoin doesn't need Ethereum-style yield, says Strategy's Michael Saylor
item.description: Michael Saylor says Bitcoin does not need staking or inflation, outlining a five-layer “Digital Asset Stack” that generates returns through credit and equity products built around BTC.

item.title: How Ghana’s EOCO and the UK NCA are Using Blockchain Analysis to Return $15 Million to Fraud Victims
item.description: When an e‑commerce “investment” platform promising high-yield returns began circulating in Ghana, thousands of people signed up to run online… The post How Ghana’s EOCO and the UK NCA are Using Blockchain Analysis to Return $15 Million to …

item.title: Bitcoin miner IREN enters Europe with Nostrum acquisition as AI pivot accelerates
item.description: The acquisition adds about 490 megawatts of secured power in Spain as IREN expands beyond Bitcoin mining and builds its European AI cloud platform.

item.title: The Modern Digital Asset StackBitcoin is Digital Capital.That is the foundation of the modern digital economy.Bitcoin is scarce, global, liquid, programmable, divisible, auditable, and available to anyone with an internet connection. It is not issued by a governme - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE9uLXdMOU4yejNRd1NlOE5Vc2lHUENPTTd2VUVySy1OdjQ5Zmg5XzFsVGpwaEo1WldMNWZINkVkQ216Sm51bmJTZEQtNktKZkFvTEU2M2JQRkRqaHM?oc=5" target="_blank">The Modern Digital Asset StackBitcoin is Di…

item.title: Tether Gold now has a dedicated options market on Bybit
item.description: These options, settled in USDT, let traders hedge risk, speculate on gold prices.

item.title: Bitcoin recovery rests on US-Iran deal as momentum remains weak
item.description: LVRG Research director Nick Ruck says Bitcoin could face a “volatile path” if a recently agreed peace deal between the US and Iran breaks down.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin falls below $66,000 as SpaceX rallies on Cursor agreement
item.description: Ether, XRP, Solana and Hyperliquid funds all took in money, but bitcoin's outflow was really just Grayscale's GBTC.

item.title: XRP gives back gains after 10% rally as traders take profit near $1.25
item.description: Asian demand and ETF inflows helped push XRP through $1.20, but the token struggled to hold its highs after running into fresh selling near a key resistance zone.

item.title: Profit-taking across bitcoin, ether, solana as traders wait on the Iran signing
item.description: A U.S.-Iran deal pulled oil lower and lifted stocks, but bitcoin's bounce is hesitant. ETF outflows just paused after a record run, and analysts say the market wants the deal signed before pricing it in.

item.title: US government watchdog urges FDIC to coordinate on crypto oversight
item.description: The US Government Accountability Office says that regulators, including the FDIC, lack an “ongoing coordination mechanism for addressing blockchain risks.”

item.title: Our debt is real. Our fiscal trajectory is unsustainable. Bitcoin is one of the few tools that could help right that wrong for younger Americans. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFA3OUE1R0VhdXp0RDdyUzh6OGs4NjdmWmY2Qk1uaDI2OEt0WUFGbXZEUXJ1WmVpVGE0MDE2SnNSc2VtaXlDQ3dfR3pOb1lOdDJQTGZjQV9qZXYtcWFSRzR3?oc=5" target="_blank">Our debt is real. Our fiscal trajector…
